data.title: ECD offers VIP Client Test Drives within 75-mile radius of its locations in West Palm Beach, Miami, and Kissimmee.
data.description: ECD's VIP Test Drive service is offered in a 75-mile radius of its locations, including West Palm Beach to Miami, Kissimmee, and surrounding areas.

data.title: Check Point Software obtains FedRAMP Authorization, providing AI-Powered Cyber Security to U.S. Federal Agencies.
data.description: Today, Check Point revealed that it has obtained complete FedRAMP Authorization, granting U.S. Federal Agencies access to AI-Powered Cyber Security solutions.

data.title: Four advisors managing $350 million in assets joined Raymond James Financial Services from Compass Investment Management, strengthening the company's team.
data.description: In St. Petersburg, Florida on September 25, 2025, financial services firm Raymond James (NYSE: RJF) announced the addition of four financial advisors from Compass Investment Management (CIM) to its independent advisor channel, Raymond James Financial Services (RJFS). This move was confirmed by Alex David, the Northeast division director for RJFS.

data.title: Global mental health apps market valued at $6.49B in 2024, projected to reach $15.69B by 2033 with a CAGR of 10.4%.
data.description: In September 25, 2025, it was reported from Austin, Texas and Tokyo that the worldwide market for mental health apps had a value of US$6.49 billion in 2024. Analysts project that it will increase to US$15.69 billion by 2033, indicating a compound annual growth rate of 10.4% from 2025 to 2033. The expansion of this market is mainly fueled by...

data.title: TCL introduces versatile TAB 8 NXTPAPER 5G tablet in Irvine, Calif. on Sept. 25, 2025.
data.description: Introducing a compact and efficient tablet with versatile performance for on-the-go use, whether for business or leisure. TCL, a leading provider of display technology in TVs, smartphones, tablets, and connected devices, launched the device from Irvine, California on Sept. 25, 2025. This tablet promises seamless performance and convenience for users seeking productivity and entertainment on a portable device.

data.title: Record 72M SOL open interest reached in Solana, price drop linked to weakened technical structure. $120 target up next.
data.description: The open interest for Solana futures surged to record levels, reaching 72 million SOL, while the technical analysis indicated potential weakness in the market. This development has reinstated the possibility of the price returning to $120.

data.title: NEI Global Relocation nominated for Relocation Management Co of the Year at 2025 FEM EMEA EMMAs in Omaha, Nebraska.
data.description: In Omaha, Nebraska on September 25th, 2025, NEI Global Relocation, a company specializing in global mobility solutions, has been recognized as one of the top contenders for the title of Relocation Management Company of the Year. They have been selected as a finalist for this prestigious award at the 2025 FEM EMEA Expatriate Management and Mobility Awards. NEI Global Relocation offers comprehensive services for international assignments and global mobility.

data.title: Nasdaq drops, Ameresco (AMRC) rises 10.5% to $34.94 after upgrade. Lithium Americas (LAC) up 16.8% to $7.02.
data.description: On Thursday, U.S. stocks experienced a decline, particularly the Nasdaq Composite which dropped by over 100 points. Ameresco, Inc. (NYSE: AMRC) saw a significant increase in its shares during the session after an upgrade from Jefferies, moving from Hold to Buy, and a price target raise from $19 to $39. As a result, Ameresco shares surged by 10.5% to reach $34.94. Another notable stock was Lithium Americas Corp. (NYSE: LAC) which recorded a 16.8% increase to $7.02 due to sustained positive momentum. Earlier in the week, the stock had initially risen following reports of...The detailed report can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Elmhurst 1925 partners with Costco to launch exclusive 3-pack of Unsweetened Cashew Milk at $1 SRP in LA and Hawaii.
data.description: ELMA, N.Y.-- Elmhurst 1925, a leading producer of premium plant-based dairy alternatives, has collaborated with Costco to introduce a new exclusive 3-pack of its popular Unsweetened Cashew Milk. This partnership signifies a major achievement for the company as it enters into the warehouse club sector, expanding its reach to a wider customer base. The new product will be initially launched in Costco stores across Los Angeles and Hawaii, with each 3-pack priced at $1, offering a competitive value for consumers.

data.title: Prelude Security secures $16M investment from Brightmind Partners, Sequoia Capital, and Insight Partners, bringing total funding to $45M. Expanding endpoint security with new technology.
data.description: Prelude Security, a leading endpoint protection platform based in New York, has secured a significant $16 million investment in their latest funding round. Brightmind Partners spearheaded the investment, joined by previous backers Sequoia Capital and Insight Partners. This new infusion of funds brings Prelude's total funding to an impressive $45 million. The company plans to utilize this capital to further develop and market their cutting-edge runtime memory protection technology, which is designed to identify and prevent malicious code during execution. Additionally, the funding will support efforts to enhance platform compatibility and expand customer deployment.

data.title: David Massola rejoins Fortune Minerals as VP Business Development to work on NICO Project finance and development. TSX: FT, OTCQB: FTMDF.
data.description: In London, Ontario, Fortune Minerals Limited (TSX: FT) (OTCQB: FTMDF) welcomes Mr. David Massola back as the Vice President, Business Development. This will aid in the transition of the NICO cobalt-gold-bismuth-copper critical minerals project, which is now moving towards project finance and development. Mr. Massola, a veteran financial executive in mining, brings decades of experience to the company. For more information, visit www.fortuneminerals.com.

data.title: XRP emerges as Wall Street's surprise contender: ETF rulings and bank charter decision in Oct 2025 make it stand out.
data.description: In October 2025, seven XRP exchange-traded fund (ETF) rulings were announced along with Ripple's decision to apply for a bank charter. This news has shed light on why financial institutions consider XRP as a potential game-changer, labeling it as Wall Street's unexpected contender.

data.title: BlackBerry Q2 FY2026 earnings call: Revenue grew by 3% to $129.6M, positive cash flow reached $3.4M, QNX had 15% revenue growth, SecuSmart ARR $213M with DBNRR at 93%.
data.description: BlackBerry Ltd. released their Q2 fiscal year 2026 results, reporting revenue of $129.6 million, a 3% YoY growth. The adjusted EBITDA reached 20% of revenue, with a positive GAAP net income for the second consecutive quarter at $13.3 million. QNX division exceeded revenue and EBITDA expectations, achieving 15% YoY revenue growth and a 32% EBITDA margin. QNX secured significant design wins, including partnerships with BMW, Qualcomm, and a leading Chinese automaker. The Secure Communications Division had quarterly revenue of $59.9 million, with annual recurring revenue at $213 million and a net retention rate of 93%. SecuSmart secured deals with the German and Canadian governments and expanded to iOS device support. These results indicate strong performance and growth opportunities for BlackBerry in the automotive and secure communications markets.

data.title: Economic leaders urge Supreme Court to retain Lisa Cook at Fed; warn of risk to Fed's independence.
data.description: Former chairs of the Federal Reserve and Secretaries of the U.S. Treasury have submitted a document to the court, warning about a potential decline in public trust regarding the independence of the Federal Reserve.
